business.name: Kissan Engineering Works
business.description: Pioneering precision engineering solutions with over two decades of expertise in manufacturing, fabrication, and industrial services. We deliver quality you can count on.

address.full: Behind Step Well, Bansilalpet, Bhoiguda, Hyderabad, Secunderabad, Telangana 500003

hero.title: Engineering
hero.subtitle: Built to Last
hero.description: Kisan Engineering Works delivers precision-engineered solutions for industrial, agricultural, and commercial sectors. Trusted by 200+ clients across India since 1995.

whyChooseUs.title: Precision Engineering
whyChooseUs.description: State-of-the-art CNC machinery and skilled operators ensuring tolerances as tight as ±0.001mm for every component.

whyChooseUs.title: On-Time Delivery
whyChooseUs.description: We understand your production timelines. Our streamlined processes guarantee delivery on schedule, every time.

whyChooseUs.title: Unmatched Quality
whyChooseUs.description: Rigorous QC at every stage — from raw material inspection to final product testing — backed by ISO 9001:2015 certification.

whyChooseUs.title: Custom Solutions
whyChooseUs.description: Every client gets tailored engineering solutions. Our design team works closely with you from concept to completion.

whyChooseUs.title: 24/7 Support
whyChooseUs.description: Round-the-clock technical support and after-sales service. We're with you at every step of your operational journey.

whyChooseUs.title: Competitive Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: Premium quality at fair pricing. We optimize our processes to deliver maximum value without compromising on standards.

testimonials.name: Rajesh Kumar
testimonials.text: Kisan Engineering Works has been our trusted manufacturing partner for over a decade. Their precision machining and timely delivery have significantly improved our production efficiency. Highly recommended!

testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.text: Exceptional quality and professional service at every interaction. The team at Kisan Engineering understands our requirements perfectly and always delivers beyond expectations. True engineering partners.

testimonials.name: Amit Patel
testimonials.text: We've partnered with Kisan Engineering for our custom fabrication needs. Their engineering expertise, attention to detail, and commitment to quality are truly unmatched in the industry.

testimonials.name: Sunil Deshmukh
testimonials.text: Outstanding fabrication work and excellent after-sales support. Kisan Engineering has helped us scale our manufacturing capacity while maintaining world-class quality standards.

about.story: Founded in 1995 by Mohammed Muzammil, Kisan Engineering Works began as a small precision machining unit in Hyderabad. Over the years, we have grown into a full-service engineering company serving clients across automotive, agriculture, construction, and industrial sectors.
about.mission: To deliver precision-engineered solutions that drive industrial growth, empower agricultural productivity, and build a sustainable future through innovation, quality, and client-centric service.
about.vision: To be India's most trusted engineering partner, recognized globally for precision, reliability, and technological excellence.

values.title: Quality First
values.description: We never compromise on quality — it's the cornerstone of every product we deliver.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: Continuously investing in new technologies and processes to stay ahead.

values.title: Integrity
values.description: Transparent business practices and honest relationships with every stakeholder.

values.title: Customer Focus
values.description: Understanding and exceeding client expectations is our primary goal.

values.title: Sustainability
values.description: Responsible manufacturing with minimal environmental footprint.

values.title: Teamwork
values.description: A skilled, motivated team that collaborates to deliver exceptional results.

milestones.event: Founded by Mohammed Muzammil in Hyderabad, Telangana
Expanded to metal fabrication and welding services
Achieved CG Power Best Service Award
